login.heroSubhead: Trusted nurses at your doorstep. Experience premium healthcare from the comfort of your home.
login.subtitle: Access your healthcare dashboard

register.heroSubhead: Whether you need care or provide it, we bring trusted healthcare into the home.
register.step1Subtitle: First, tell us how you want to use Care+.

patient.title: I am a Patient
patient.description: I want to book trusted home nurses.

nurse.title: I am a Nurse
nurse.description: I want to offer my healthcare services.

register.step2SubtitlePatient: Sign up to start booking care.
register.nurseNotice: You will be asked to complete your professional profile and specialization in the next step. An admin must approve your profile before you can receive bookings.
register.consentTail: . I understand that Care+ is a marketplace connecting me with verified healthcare professionals and that medical decisions are made jointly with my nurse — not by the platform.
register.consentRequired: Please review and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.

pendingApproval.title: Approval Pending
pendingApproval.description: Your nurse account is waiting for admin review.
pendingApproval.body: You can log in, but nurse dashboard access is available only after approval.
pendingApproval.resubmitDescription: Your most recent profile changes are awaiting admin re-approval.
pendingApproval.resubmitBody: Patients won't see your updated profile until an admin re-approves it. We'll notify you once it's done.

googleRole.title: One more step
googleRole.body: Choose how you'll use Care+. You can't change this later from your profile, so pick the role that matches you.
googleRole.patientDescription: Book nurses, manage care, and order supplies.
googleRole.nurseDescription: Offer services to patients. Admin review required before going live.
